ai_summary: Yoselin Lotzin-Mendoza is a highly qualified Georgia candidate with four years of formal childcare experience as a floater and assistant teacher. She is flexible with scheduling (FT/PT, morning preferred), handles conflicts using positive guidance techniques, and shows strong patience and care for children. Her 45-minute drive is acceptable.
